use_cases: Visualizing AI agent swarm behavior and neural network connections in real-time
Creating immersive animated hero sections for AI and SaaS landing pages
Demonstrating data clustering and swarm intelligence concepts interactively
Adding ambient animated backgrounds to dashboards or marketing sites
Educational tool for explaining collective AI behavior patterns
ai_summary: An interactive canvas-based particle system that visualizes AI swarm behavior through autonomous moving particles that form proximity-based connections. Features multiple visualization modes (Neural Network, Swarm Intelligence, Data Clustering), configurable settings for particle count, speed, and connection distance, plus light/dark theme support. Renders smooth animated connections between particles with gradient-like opacity effects, suitable for hero sections, backgrounds, or educational AI demonstrations.
